MetaDataVersion.Name: TROPIC Trial ADaM Metadata Specification
MetaDataVersion.Description: Metadata specification for TROPIC Phase III re-analysis ADaM datasets

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADSL
ItemGroupDef.Label: Subject-Level Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Subject-level characteristics, treatment allocations, survival, and baseline covariates.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADEX
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Exposure Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Cycle-level actual dose performance, cumulative exposure, actual/planned dose intensities, and RDI calculations.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADCM
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per medication
ItemGroupDef.Label: Concomitant Medications Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Concomitant medication usage including G-CSF prophylaxis markers, prednisone compliance, and NACT timelines.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADAE
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per adverse event
ItemGroupDef.Label: Adverse Events Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Treatment-emergent adverse events, severity classifications, serious AEs, and custom myelosuppressive episode merging.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADLB
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Laboratory Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Longitudinal absolute laboratory measurements, CTCAE grading, Worst-in-window flags (ANL01FL), and continuous nadir models.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADRS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per parameter per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Efficacy Response Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: RECIST 1.1 soft-tissue assessments, bone-lesion scan progression tracking, objective responses, and PSA progressions.

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADTTE
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per time-to-event parameter
ItemGroupDef.Label: Time-to-Event Analysis Dataset
ItemGroupDef.Description: Survival endpoints including Overall Survival (OS), Progression-Free Survival (PFS), TTPSA, and time-to-SAE endpoints.

CommentDef.Description: Sequence index increments when chronological gap between myeloid AEs is > 3 days, representing separate clinical episodes.
Calculates minimum post-baseline ANC value per cycle for individual patients to model continuous dose-toxicity relationships.
Identifies the start date of any post-baseline systemic anti-cancer therapy, acting as the primary censor-date boundary for PFS calculations.
